login.title: Sign in
login.description: Use your Harasy identity for every product.
login.errorRoot: Could not sign in. Check your email and password.
login.trustDescription: Enter the verification code we sent to your email to continue signing in.

register.title: Create your account
register.description: One identity for your entire Harasy workspace.
register.terms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
register.errorRoot: Could not create your account. Try again.
register.verifyDescription: Enter the verification code we sent to your email to finish creating your account.

forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.description: We will email you a code to reset your password.
forgot.codeSentHint: Check your inbox for the reset code.

validation.passwordMin6: Password must be at least 6 characters
